plugins.name: env-guardian
plugins.description: Scan for exposed secrets, generate .env templates, validate environment configs, and rotate secrets

plugins.name: api-forge
plugins.description: Generate API test suites, create mock servers, run contract tests, and benchmark endpoints

plugins.name: log-sleuth
plugins.description: Analyze log files for patterns, search with structured queries, get logging recommendations, and correlate across services

plugins.name: perf-pilot
plugins.description: Generate load tests, analyze performance bottlenecks, and create performance budgets with CI enforcement

plugins.name: pipeline-ops
plugins.description: Generate CI/CD pipelines, debug build failures, optimize pipeline speed, and create multi-environment matrices

plugins.name: dep-shield
plugins.description: Audit dependencies for vulnerabilities, check for outdated packages, scan licenses for compliance, and plan safe updates

plugins.name: cost-hawk
plugins.description: Analyze cloud infrastructure costs, optimize Docker images, tune database performance, and generate cost reports

plugins.name: schema-drift
plugins.description: Generate database migrations, detect schema drift, validate migration safety, and auto-document schemas

plugins.name: notify-hub
plugins.description: Set up notification services (email/SMS/push), create templates, and build notification pipelines with user preferences

plugins.name: uptime-sentinel
plugins.description: Create health check endpoints, set up uptime monitoring, generate status pages, and create incident runbooks
